---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Timeless Hadith
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
e.g. "I find it frustrating when..."

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any mockups, screenshots, or links that help illustrate the request.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with the site's mission (accessible, authentic, free)
- [ ] I am willing to help implement or test this feature
